Account

Community Standing

Your standing affects what features you can access across Mirvox

shield_person

Your Standing

Current community status on your account

✅
Good Standing
You have full access to all Mirvox features.
stars

Standing Tiers

How community standing affects your experience

🌟
Exemplary
Outstanding community member. Unlocks special badge and priority support.
Default
✅
Good Standing
Full access to all features. Normal community member.
⚠️
Restricted
Limited features. No file uploads, voice, or reactions. Rate-limited messaging.
🚫
Suspended
Read-only access. Cannot send messages, join voice, or interact with content.
checklist

Your Feature Access

Based on your current standing tier

admin_panel_settings

Manage Standing

Change community standing for users — affects their feature access immediately

groupLoading users…
Experimental

Labs

Early-access features — things may break. Your feedback shapes what ships next.

science

Heads up: Labs features are experimental and may change or disappear. They won't affect your messages or data.

translate

Message Translator

Hover any message to see a translate button — renders the message in your chosen language inline

New
Uses MyMemory free translation API · No data stored
mood

Reaction Tooltips

Hover a reaction to see exactly who reacted — shows a list of display names

Beta
Requires reactions to be stored in Firestore per message
schedule

Relative Timestamps

Show message times as "2 minutes ago" instead of "2:34 PM"

New
Updates every 30 seconds · Full timestamp on hover
search

In-Channel Search

Press Ctrl+F while in a channel to search through loaded messages

Experimental
Searches only the 200 most recent loaded messages
density_medium

Message Density

Control the vertical spacing between messages for a tighter or airier feel

Beta
3
Overrides the compact mode padding setting
center_focus_strong

Focus Mode

Hide the server sidebar and member panel for a distraction-free chat view — toggle with Alt+F

Experimental
Press Alt+F to toggle · Esc to exit
chat_bubble

Bubble Chat Style

Display messages in iMessage-style speech bubbles instead of the classic layout

Experimental
Your messages appear on the right · Others on the left
gif_box

Giphy Live Search

Upgrade the GIF picker to search millions of GIFs from Giphy in real time

New
Powered by Giphy · Results rated G · No account needed
preview

Markdown Preview

See a live rendered preview of your message as you type — press the eye button in the chat bar

Beta
Supports **bold**, *italic*, `code`, ~~strikethrough~~, and links
brightness_auto

Theme Scheduler

Automatically switch between light and dark mode based on the time of day

New
light_mode
dark_mode
Overrides manual dark/light toggle while active
palette

Custom Accent Color

Replace the default blue with any color — buttons, links, and highlights all update instantly

Experimental
Color is saved across sessions
celebration

Party Mode 🎉

Confetti, sparkles & rainbow bursts across the whole app. 100% local — no one else sees it.

Fun
auto_awesome Status: Off
filter_drama
Confetti Rain
Continuous falling confetti pieces
flare
Burst Rings
Periodic radial explosion bursts
star
Star Shapes
Mix in 5-point star confetti pieces
palette
Rainbow Tint
Subtle disco colour pulse on the background
celebration
One-Time Burst
Fire a confetti explosion right now, no toggle needed
Effects are saved across sessions · Only visible to you ✨ Local only

delete_forever

Delete Account

This action is permanent and cannot be reversed

What will be deleted

person_offYour profile and display name
chat_bubble_outlineAll messages sent in servers
mail_outlineAll direct message history
groupsYour server memberships
Deleting account…
pause_circle

Disable Account

Your account will be paused — sign back in anytime to re-enable it

While disabled

visibility_offYour profile won't appear to others
notifications_offYou won't receive any notifications
lock_openYour messages and data are kept safe
check_circleSign back in anytime to restore everything

Change Email

A verification link will be sent to your new address

mail
Current email
—
info

After updating, a verification link will be sent to your new address. Your email won't change until you click it.

⚙️ Server Settings

Server Icon
🏠
Server
Change the icon and name below
🖼️
Click to upload or drag & drop
PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP • Square image recommended
🏠
🔗 Invite Link
Servers with 10+ members get a vanity URL based on the server name.
Servers below 10 members use a random invite code.
—
⚠️ Danger Zone
Delete this server
Permanently removes all channels and messages
Custom Emoji
Upload custom emoji for members to use with :name: syntax
No custom emoji yet.
Server Audit Log
Recent moderation and admin actions on this server
Server Roles
Roles let you group members and assign permissions
AutoMod
Automatically moderate content in your server. Rules apply to all text channels. Admins & moderators are always exempt.
securityEnable AutoMod
Master switch — turns all AutoMod rules on or off
speedAnti-Spam
Delete messages if a user sends too many in a short time
Max messages per seconds
do_not_disturb_onProfanity Filter
Block messages containing banned words (whole-word matching)
Custom Blocked Words
Leave blank to use built-in list only. Separate with commas. Matches whole words by default.
link_offBlock Links
Delete messages containing URLs (mods/admins exempt)
Allowed Domains (whitelist)
Comma-separated. Leave blank to block all links.
group_addBlock Server Invites
Block messages that contain Mirvox server invite links
font_downloadCaps Filter
Block messages where a large percentage is uppercase
Block if more than % caps (min 8 chars)
alternate_emailMention Spam
Block messages with too many @mentions
Max mentions per message
moodEmoji Spam
Block messages containing excessive emojis
Max emojis per message
content_copyAnti-Duplicate
Block a user from sending the same message twice in a row
shield_lockRaid Protection
Auto-lockdown if many users join in a short time window
Alert if users join within seconds
Mods will be notified and new members will be restricted.
gavelDefault Action on Violation
text_snippetLog AutoMod actions to…
AutoMod violations will be posted in this channel (optional)
